title: minuartia woronowii
intro: Minuartia woronowii, also known as the mountain chamomile or mountain mayweed, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of Minuartia woronowii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
